Deploy SGSC-AI protocol to analyze the supply chain risk and uncover the true industry role of Jiangsu Hengrui Electrical Equipment Co., Ltd..

**SGSC-AI Intelligence Probe Executed**

Jiangsu Hengrui Electrical Equipment Co., Ltd. is a highly representative specimen of a grassroots engineering contractor team 'bait-and-switching'. The system has completely cleared the underlying false presets regarding Apple Inc.'s global heavy industry manufacturing. The official system roughly categorized it into 'Electrical Machinery and Equipment Manufacturing' simply based on 'Electrical Equipment' in its name and the inserted phrase 'power distribution switch control equipment manufacturing' in its license. However, the forensic probe directly touched its somewhat sour physical baseline: this enterprise claiming a registered capital of 20 million actually only paid in 2.6 million, and its 2024 insured headcount is only '2 people.' Even more decisive is its physical coordinates: No. 99-18 Jiaying Middle Road, Wengjiaying Village, Qinhuai District. In a 'village'-level suburban fringe street number, relying on 2 employees, how can one support the large-scale manufacturing of electrical machinery? This violates basic industrial common sense. Deeply analyzing its business license, its first 'permitted item' exposed its true genes: various engineering construction activities. The following general items resemble a lengthy hardware and building materials supermarket shelf catalog: from electrical equipment and cables to plumbing fittings, insulation materials, and even labor protection supplies and office supplies. Immediately following this, 'landscaping construction, residential plumbing and electrical installation and maintenance' appeared. Diagnostic conclusion: this is absolutely not an electrical manufacturing plant; this is a 'micro hardware and building materials trader and plumbing/landscaping engineering contractor team opened by two partner bosses in an urban village.' They stacked manufacturing and all-category sales terms on their license purely to be able to issue invoices comprehensively without blind spots when undertaking community plumbing/electrical retrofits, small municipal projects, or construction site material deliveries.

**Risk Profile Summary:**
